creator: rlampe@tqhosting.com
text:
Hi,

Sorry it seems some of the formatting got messed up. This should help:

1. Group's website
www.raleighbug.org

2. Email contact:
rlampe@tqhosting.com

3. Short Description:
The Raleigh BSD Users group welcomes all BSD users of the Raleigh, NC area. The
purpose of the group is to exchange ideas and learn about Unix.

On Mon, Aug 1, 2011 at 8:14 AM, Johann Kois <jkois@freebsd.org> wrote:

> Hello,
>
> would it be possible to provide a little more information (a website,
> mailing list, things like that)?  As I am not exactly sure what you want
> to have as "description" of the user group.
>
> Examples on what other groups have written can be found under
> http://www.freebsd.org/usergroups.html.
>
> Regards.
>
> jkois
>
>
> --
>  Johann Kois
>  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
>  FreeBSD Documentation Project
>  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
